data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not demonstrate that the system supports parallel signature routing as required. The linked use case describes a sequential routing process without any indication of simultaneous signatures from Party A and B. The absence of concrete evidence or checks confirming the parallel routing leads to a clear gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the implementation of parallel signature routing (Party A and B simultaneously, then C).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the parallel signature routing requirement.
